name: Beacon World
summary: Solo-first persistent salvage world: drone picks up energy cores, repairs beacons, dodges pulsing hazards. Single-player works out of the box; the `connected` profile turns it multiplayer.

extensionPoints.summary: Add a new project-local component (data shape only).
Add a new project-local system that reads / writes those components.
Add a new pickup kind: declare it on a `Pickup` entity, decide which `Repairable.accepts` matches.
Add a new material variant. Declare in asset-sources, run engine check to validate.
Capture a robot scenario the agent / CI can replay.
